data.body: FRAC-22 implementation complete — 3 commits on frac-22-audit-home. Audit doc at .lattice/notes/audits/home-audit.md covers 11 typography rows (5 worked-example from plan + 6 new) and 11 color rows (5 worked-example + 6 new). 1 gap entry appended to audit-gaps.md (Home protocol mono-uppercase-weight-100 cluster at Home.tsx:35). Tests: typecheck clean, baseline-only test failures (footer FRAC-88 italic, footer Jacquard, navigation mobile labels, neighborhood min-h-screen), no lint script in this repo.

VERDICT: PASS

Reviewed cold against plan at .lattice/plans/task_01KTJQF0482H67984A2QTMMESE.md. Read the plan, audit-prompt sections 4/5/6/7/10, the lab-audit precedent, the new home-audit.md, and audit-gaps.md. Spot-checked 14 file:line references against Home.tsx and Hero.tsx — every opening-tag line and className transcription matches the source exactly. Ran pnpm typecheck (clean) and pnpm test (only the 4 documented baselines failed: footer FRAC-88 italic, footer Jacquard, navigation mobile labels, neighborhood min-h-screen).

Acceptance checklist:
- [PASS] home-audit.md exists, follows section-10 structure (Page block, In-scope/Out-of-scope preamble, Typography, Color, Forward observations, Gap appendix).
- [PASS] Both in-scope files represented by typography + color rows.
- [PASS] Out-of-scope list matches plan: OctahedronHero, FractalCityScene, Skyline, FractalObject, shared chrome — all documented with rationale.
- [PASS] Typography rows match section-4 format and opening-tag line rule.
- [PASS] Color rows match section-5 format and (file + token) grouping rule.
- [PASS] Responsive elements (Home.tsx:35) list both mobile and desktop renderings.
- [PASS] Every text-foreground/<alpha> and text-background/<alpha> classified EXACT.
- [PASS] No text-white / text-black / text-gray-* / unclassified text-[…] color utilities. The lone text-[10px] at Hero.tsx:289 is a SIZE override explicitly covered with rationale.
- [PASS] All 6 pre-walked surface pairing sites present and correctly classified: Home.tsx:19 EXACT, Home.tsx:25 NEAR, Hero.tsx:120 NEAR, Hero.tsx:133 NEAR, Hero.tsx:194 EXACT, Hero.tsx:240 NEAR.
- [PASS] Golden Age Protocol cluster (Home.tsx:35) classified GAP and appended to audit-gaps.md.
- [PASS] OctahedronHero and FractalCityScene documented as excluded with the plan's rationale.
- [PASS-with-minor-note] Plan's worked-example rows appear verbatim. One deviation: the 11th 'house-identity' worked-example row (border-foreground at Hero.tsx:133) is merged into the bg+border combined color row at L239-246 of the audit doc rather than appearing as a standalone row. The merger is consistent with the (file + token) grouping rule applied across the doc and matches the lab-audit precedent (DocumentBadge.tsx:58 combines border + background on the same node). All substantive content from the worked example (EXACT classification, foreground token, MIGRATE action, house-identity rationale) is preserved in the combined row. Not a blocking miss.
- [PASS] Gap appendix in audit doc mirrors the new audit-gaps.md entry.
- [PASS] No src/ files modified (git diff master..HEAD touches only .lattice/).
- [PASS] No DESIGN.md changes.
- [PASS] No audit-prompt.md changes.
- [PASS] pnpm typecheck clean. pnpm test = 4 baseline failures only, no regressions.
- [PASS] House identity rule honored: no text-house-* / bg-house-* on Home chrome; the audit explicitly walks this and confirms.
- [PASS] No sibling-agent files touched.
- [PASS] audit-gaps.md is append-only (prior FRAC-20 Lab entry untouched; one new Home entry appended).
- [PASS] 3 logical commits per plan strategy (catchup, audit, gaps append).

Tests: typecheck=clean, tests=4 baseline failures only (footer FRAC-88 italic, footer Jacquard, navigation mobile labels, neighborhood min-h-screen).

No inline fixes made. Moving to done.
